retry_reason: drm_gem_object_put is a release operation; retrying after a successful put would cause a double-free. If the bo pointer was NULL, there is nothing to release.
contract_summary: This function releases a reference to an amdgpu_bo by calling drm_gem_object_put on its embedded GEM object. After the call, the caller's pointer is set to NULL to prevent use-after-free. This is a standard put wrapper: it decrements the reference count, potentially freeing the object if the count reaches zero. The caller must not access the bo after calling this function. The operation is unconditional (if bo is non-NULL) and always succeeds. There are no retry semantics or special lock requirements.
